name: clipboard-typer
title: Clipboard Typer
description: Type the current clipboard content as keyboard input.
author: lucabmn

commands.name: type-clipboard
commands.title: Type Clipboard
commands.description: Type the current clipboard content as keyboard input.

commands.name: type-clipboard-history
commands.title: Type from Clipboard History
commands.description: Choose a clipboard history item and type it as keyboard input.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
